title: verbascum dentifolium
intro: Verbascum dentifolium, also known as the woolly mullein, is a biennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its large, hairy leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Verbascum dentifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to make cough syrups, salves, and other herbal remedies.
